hero.role: Mechatronics Engineer · AI Specialist · Robotics Technical Leader
hero.statement: I don't just design systems: I implement them, test them, and make them work in real contexts.
hero.tagline: Systems Engineering · Operational Execution · Sustainable Impact

about.title: Professional Profile
about.description: I am interested in technology not as an end, but as a means to solve real problems. My work moves between engineering, education, and operational execution, always seeking to bridge the gap between theory and effective implementation.
about.philosophy: I prefer systems that work for 10 years over brilliant solutions that fail in production.
mindset: Systemic approach: complete processes, not isolated tasks.
High tolerance for incomplete contexts and pressure.

items.description: Strategic leadership of a last-mile logistics startup. Managed traceability of +27,500 monthly packages via data systematization and the development of BaruLogix, a proprietary operational control platform.

AI consulting and corporate training. Delivered 6+ programs for clients like Sagezza (AI for adults 60+), Colegio Bilingüe San José Campestre, and Eduqualityco, focusing on agentic systems (Google Antigravity, Manus) and rapid ROI.

Representing Colombia among 190+ nations. Achieved Top 4 Worldwide (2024) and 3rd Place in Engineering Documentation. Leading international relations and technical optimization under extreme pressure.
Developed 7+ production platforms using vibe coding and agentic IDEs (Google Antigravity). Clients include BaruCourier (BaruLogix), Carnitas by Mr. Cousins, and various educational institutions.
Led the 'Pacífico en su Salsa' project digitalization. Applied generative AI and prompt engineering to label design for traditional Viche entrepreneurs, bridging cultural heritage with Industry 4.0.
Co-founded one of the first FTC teams in Colombia. Leading mechanical design, construction strategy, and materials selection under international FIRST standards.
Chassis design and technical documentation for the FIRST Robotics Competition. Supported mechanisms development in full compliance with FRC regulations.
Supported first-semester students in the COMPAS program. Designed formative strategies for civic education and critical thinking within an interdisciplinary context.

international.title: Global Impact
international.description: Active participation in international science and technology scenarios.
items: National Leader at FIRST Global Challenge (Geneva, Switzerland 2022)
International recognition on social media Team Colombia

contact.title: Contact
contact.message: I am interested in projects where technology has a clear purpose, is executed with rigor, and generates real impact. Always open to conversations involving engineering, innovation, and building systems that work in the real world.
